text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho didn't show up for training today so
I've been searching everywhere for her. The sun is
starting to set when I finally find her in the library.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, Familiar. What're you doing here?
choice_data_list: We were supposed to have training today.
We were supposed to have training today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I-It's not like I forgot! I've just been really busy
practicing magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! I'll just use magic to reverse time back to
before training starts! That'll definitely work!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Turn back already! C'mon! Philadelphus reversal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell she's sorry by how desperately she's
trying to use magic, so I let her off with a warning.
